project_context.domain: Aviation Operations Control Center (OCC) / Serious Simulation Game
project_context.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) / Retro-Futurism Hybrid (Control Room Grid)
project_context.vibe: Tense, professional, information-dense, tactical, objective. 'Bloomberg Terminal meets AIMS Airline Ops'.

typography.anti_ai_rules: No Inter. No Space Grotesk. No default sans-serifs.

headings.usage: Data points, KPI numbers, Status codes (Flight Numbers, Crew IDs), and Primary Section Headers

body.usage: Standard UI text, descriptions, rule explanations, tooltips

mono_accents.usage: Timestamps, coordinates, log outputs, raw IDs

layout_and_spacing.corners: rounded-none (Strictly 0px border-radius everywhere. No pill buttons, no rounded cards. Emulate legacy hardware).
layout_and_spacing.density: High density. Use tight padding (p-1, p-2) inside data tables and Gantt charts. Use p-4 for panel containers.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse style layouts with 1px borders between all grid items.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align all data arrays. Right-align numerical KPIs and costs.

components.panels: bg-[#0A0A0C] border border-white/10 rounded-none. No drop shadows.
components.buttons: Square edges. Default: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10. Primary action: border border-[#00E5FF] text-[#00E5FF] hover:bg-[#00E5FF] hover:text-black.
components.status_badges: Border-only badges with neon text. Example: text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/50 bg-[#FF3B30]/10. Never use solid fills.
components.tables_and_gantt: Zebra striping with ultra-subtle greys (bg-white/[0.02]). Monospace fonts for all table data cells. Sticky headers.
components.modals: Backdrop blur is permitted for depth (backdrop-blur-md bg-black/80). Modals must have a 2px top-border of the relevant status color (e.g., Red for Incident Queue).
components.forms: Inputs should have bottom-border only (border-b) or strict rectangular 1px borders. bg-black/50. No focus rings, use border color change on focus.

motion_and_interactions.speed: Instant (0ms to 100ms). The UI must feel like a zero-latency military or aviation terminal. Do not use spring animations.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle background lighten (bg-white/5), instant text color brighten.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Terminal cursor blinking '_' or raw ASCII progress bars [||||....].

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight. No Duotone (to maintain starkness).

media.usage: Use this image heavily darkened (bg-black/80 overlay) for the initial simulation boot-up/loading screen.

view_specific_guidelines.ops_dashboard: Masonry/CSS Grid. Massive typography for KPIs. Heavy use of Status Colors. Example: OTP (On-Time Performance) in 6xl Azeret Mono.
view_specific_guidelines.roster_board: Assign-style grid. Rows = Crew (Rank, Qual, Name). Columns = Days. Use `duty_blocks` colors for the cell backgrounds. Sticky leftmost column.
view_specific_guidelines.flight_timeline: Gantt chart view. Horizontal scroll. X-axis = Time. Y-axis = Aircraft Registrations. Blocks representing flights. Cyan = on-time, Red = delayed.
view_specific_guidelines.ai_advisor: Right-side drawer or persistent side panel. Use JetBrains Mono for the AI's output to mimic a telex or ACARS message. Prefix with '>> SYS_MSG:'.
view_specific_guidelines.incident_queue: A scrolling feed of alerts. Red text for critical (weather, sickness), yellow for warnings (late reports). Interactive rows to open Decision Action Modals.

testing_requirements.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='incident-resolve-btn'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Azeret Mono, Figtree, and JetBrains Mono fonts in index.html or global css.
Strictly adhere to the 'Control Room' grid layout: zero rounded corners, 1px visible borders, ultra-dark backgrounds.
Do NOT use default Shadcn themes (no rounded-md, no soft shadows, no Inter font). You must customize the primitive components to be sharp and flat.
Use CSS Grid for the layout skeleton (h-screen, overflow-hidden on body) to ensure it feels like a native app/kiosk, not a scrolling web page.
For the Timeline and Roster boards, implement robust horizontal scrolling with fixed Y-axis headers (using position: sticky).
Prioritize data density. The interface should feel slightly overwhelming at first glance, just like a real OCC.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Keep surfaces mathematically flat.
